convention.id_format: H001..H055 / G000..G032 (existing — H000-H054 in source files; G000-G032)
convention.description_format: single sentence noting dominant theme + secondary themes if mixed
convention.mixed_flag: Y when cluster spans 2+ unrelated semantic fields the name cannot fully capture

H000.name: Defects & Singletons
H000.description: Catch-all of low-frequency unrelated terms (foolish, slander, perversity, defect) — heterogeneous leaf cluster.

H001.name: Hope & Waiting
H001.description: Awaiting/hoping in trust, with adjacent uprightness and refuge terms.

H002.name: Joy & Rejoicing
H002.description: Verbs and nouns of joy, gladness, singing for joy, shouting in delight.

H003.name: Enmity & Aversion
H003.description: Enmity, despising, hatred, abhorrence, sluggishness — the cluster of aversive states.

H004.name: Sin's Penalty
H004.description: Small cluster: iniquity-as-punishment, sin-as-punishment, bitterness, refuse — the consequence-side of sin.

H005.name: Aramaic Wisdom & Authority
H005.description: Aramaic terms (Daniel/Ezra): wisdom, knowledge, ruling, dominion, holy, judge, praise.

H006.name: Forming & Intention
H006.description: To form/yatsar (potter, plan, formed), with adjacent restraint, desire, sign, breaking.

H007.name: Pride & Haughtiness
H007.description: Pride, haughtiness, height, greatness — pulling in delight/desire as adjacent affects.

H008.name: Fear & Trembling
H008.description: Large cluster of fear/trembling/dread terms (yare, pachad, charad, ragaz) plus adjacent silence, security, weariness.

H009.name: Knowledge & Wisdom
H009.description: Knowledge, understanding, wisdom, counsel, prudence, with folly as paired opposite.

H010.name: Purity & Defilement
H010.description: Pure/purity terms (taher, tahor, tohar) anchored against fornication.

H011.name: Mourning & Weeping
H011.description: Mourning, weeping, sighing, tears, sorrow, with comfort/repentance as paired response.

H012.name: Service & Ministry
H012.description: Avad/avodah family — to serve, ministry, service-as-work, slavery, plus consecrate-prepare.

H013.name: Atonement
H013.description: Cleanest cluster — kaphar/kipper/kippurim only (atone, cover, atonement).

H014.name: Perversion & Overthrow
H014.description: Overturning, overthrow, crooked, perversity, devastation; plus minor jealousy-related entries.

H015.name: Rest & Quiet
H015.description: Nuach family — rest, resting place, quietness; plus chasad (be kind/shame), unblemished.

H016.name: Justice & Injustice
H016.description: Polar mix — injustice/treachery/deceit/wickedness clustered with righteousness/justify/blameless. Polarity inside one cluster is structurally significant.

H017.name: Terror & Dread
H017.description: Terror-specific cluster (chittah, magor, mechittah, etc.) plus adjacent ruthless and bitterness.

H018.name: Voice & Outcry
H018.description: Small cluster: qal (voice, sound), portion, rage, pain, trust — heterogeneous with voice as anchor.

H019.name: Covenantal Core (Mixed)
H019.description: Largest cluster (T1=73, T2=107). Hebrew theological/covenantal vocabulary: chesed, emet, chen, tsedeq, qadosh, racham, shamar, shuv, zakhar, chayah, baqash, baruch — plus rule, choose, ask, ruin, integrity, salvation. Too broad to name simply; recursive sub-clustering recommended before naming sub-leaves.

H020.name: Madness & Bewilderment
H020.description: Madness, bewilderment, faint, anxiety, firebrand — disorder of mind cluster.

H021.name: Strength & Might
H021.description: Hebrew strength terms (ko'ach, oz, ezuz, etan, ammits) plus security and severe.

H022.name: Calling & Encounter
H022.description: Qara/qara family — to call, to call out, to read, to encounter, to meet (clean morphological cluster).

H023.name: Praise & Song
H023.description: Praise/boast (halal), song/melody (zamar/mizmor), thanksgiving (yadah, todah), supplication, faithfulness, glory, wonder.

H024.name: Hearing & Obeying
H024.description: Shama family — hear, obey, proclaim, understand, judge — plus report, tidings, sound, guard.

H025.name: Aramaic Action Mix
H025.description: Tiny Aramaic cluster: joy, rebellion, prophesying, willing, shut, make, wrath. Heterogeneous Aramaic verbs.

H026.name: Defilement & Abomination
H026.description: Tame/abomination/uncleanness/impurity (tame, niddah, toevah, shiqquts) plus guilty, common, conceal.

H027.name: Pleasantness & Loveliness
H027.description: Naim family — pleasant, lovely, pleasantness, musical (small cluster, single root dominance).

H028.name: Anger, Evil & Turning Away
H028.description: Anger/wrath family (charah, charon, chemah, qatsaph, qana, zaam) merged with sur (turn aside), wickedness (rasha, raah), strife (riv), hate (sane), deception (sheqer), transgression (pesha). The 'turning toward evil' macro-cluster.

H029.name: Aramaic Strength & Bitterness
H029.description: Small Aramaic cluster: strength, treacherous, crush, bitterness, willing, grief, smoothness.

H030.name: End & Completion
H030.description: Kalah family — to end (finish, destroy, decide, expend), consumption, perfection, limit. Clean.

H031.name: Folly & Sickness
H031.description: Folly (sikhlut, pash, sakhal-fool), sickness/disease, rebellion, disgrace, master/husband — disorder cluster.

H032.name: Strife & Despair
H032.description: Strife (matstsah/matstsut), distress (matsoq), anguish, struggle, anxious (daag), despair (ya'ash), weeping.

H033.name: Devising & Planning
H033.description: Chashav family — to devise (design, count, devise, think), plot, plow, listen, dominion, invention.

H034.name: Pride & Lowliness
H034.description: Polar cluster — pride/height/majesty (gaon, geut, gevurah, marom) merged with humility/contrite/poor (anavah, dakka, anav). The exalted-vs-lowly axis.

H035.name: Cruelty & Harshness
H035.description: Cruel (akhzar), strength, contempt, terror, scorching, vexed — harshness cluster.

H036.name: Sin & Consecration (Cultic)
H036.description: Cultic-system cluster — sin/sin-offering (chattat) merged with consecration/holiness (qadash, qodesh) and unblemished. The sacrificial-system semantic field.

H038.name: Pressing & Confining
H038.description: Tsur (confine, provoke, form), tsuq (press), with willing and treachery as outliers.

H039.name: Peace & Well-being
H039.description: Shalom family (peace, well-being, friendship, greeting, completely) plus to-keep/shamar:look-at, to-rest, to-quiet, innocence, love-as-friend.

H040.name: Delight & Indulgence
H040.description: Anog family — to delight, dainty, luxury — plus bosom/embrace, obedience, stubbornness, pain.

H041.name: Aramaic Faith & Strength
H041.description: Aramaic cluster: trust, ask, gracious, strength, wise, compassion, grow, rule, wonder.

H042.name: Mixed Minor Terms II
H042.description: Heterogeneous singletons — cheerful, rise, silence, shine, confidence, comfort, integrity, dishonor, boil. Like H000, a leftover/leaf cluster.

H043.name: Lust & Fornication
H043.description: Zanah/taznut (fornication), agav/agavah (lust), lover, hating, abhor, lamentation. The illicit-desire cluster.

H044.name: Honor & Glory
H044.description: Kavod family — glory, honor, glorious, heaviness, riches — plus arrange/value (arakh), prosper, rank.

H045.name: Horror & Assembly
H045.description: Tiny mixed: horror, upright, destruction, assembly, proclamation, extolling.

H046.name: Iniquity & Forgiveness
H046.description: Iniquity/avon (crime, guilt) merged with forgive (salach, selichah), gracious (chanun, rachum), pity (chus), supplication, pray, ransom — plus rebel, transgress, idol. The sin-and-mercy axis.

H047.name: Pledge & Provocation
H047.description: Mixed: pledge/labour (chaval), wealth, desire (chashaq), connect, provoke (marar), slander, charm, deceive, shudder, roar.

H048.name: Strengthening & Vigor
H048.description: Chazaq + chayil families — to strengthen, hold, prevail, persevere; strength as wealth/worthiness/soldiers.

H049.name: Languishing & Sorrow
H049.description: Small mixed: languish, dismay, sorrow, illness, joy (anomaly), compassion, distress, beautify.

H050.name: Enemy & Threat
H050.description: Enemy (oyev, tsar), opponent, hostile, terror, dismay, breaking, prey, tear — plus refuge, hope, master as adjacents.

H051.name: Destruction & Decay
H051.description: Destruction (machshit, mashchit, chevel, chaloph), remove, slander, mourning, repose, prevail, swerve, quietness, delight — heterogeneous decay/destruction cluster.

H052.name: Aramaic Distress & Plotting
H052.description: Aramaic cluster: break, displeased, hastily, dismay, strive, fear, plan, fantasies, perplexed, startled, hate, distinguish.

H053.name: Shame & Reproach
H053.description: Bosh/boshet/bushah (shame, ashamed) plus cherpah (reproach), kalam (humiliated), kelimmah (shame). Plus refuge, breaking, hope, outcry, pride as outliers.

H054.name: Distress & Anguish
H054.description: Tsar/tsarah/metsuqah/tsuq family — distress, anguish, terror, hard, vex, pain, contempt — plus compassion (chemlah) and judgment.

G000.name: Stumbling & Mind
G000.description: Stumbling block (proskomma, skandalon), be bold, weakness, abhor, discernment, reason, thoughtful, high, lazy, fervent, sound mind. Mixed thinking + stumbling.

G001.name: Boldness & Weakness
G001.description: Boldness (parrēsia, tolmaō), confidence, plan, pray, dispute — mixed against weakness, dishonour. Polar mix.

G002.name: Desire & Defilement
G002.description: Epithumia (desire/long for), impurity (akatharsia), corruption, defilement, callous, deceit, dishonor, idolatry, self-will, philosophy, pleasure. The 'corrupt desire' cluster.

G003.name: Sin, Grace & Salvation
G003.description: Major theological cluster — hamartia/hamartanō/hamartolos (sin/sinful), charis/charisma/charizō (grace), aphesis (forgiveness), sōzō (save), metanoia (repentance), parabasis (transgression), katallassō (reconcile), paraptōma (trespass).

G004.name: Justice & Righteousness
G004.description: Dikaios family — just, righteousness, justify, justification, condemnation, avenge, vengeance — plus opponent, accountable.

G005.name: Joy, Peace & Endurance
G005.description: Chairō/chara (rejoice/joy), eirēnē (peace), elpis/elpizō (hope), eucharistia (thanksgiving), hupomonē (perseverance), parakaleō/paraklēsis (comfort/encouragement) — plus ekklēsia and the consoling cluster around it.

G006.name: Goodness & Mercy
G006.description: Agathos (good), agathopoieō (do good), eleos (mercy), epieikēs (gentle), peaceful, brotherhood, sister, genuine, of-one's-household, propitiation, reverence-for-God, zealot.

G007.name: Anguish & Crying
G007.description: Klaiō (weep), krazō (cry), basanismos (torment), douleia (slavery), labor — plus expire, listen, strong, plunder.

G008.name: Phileō Love & Affection
G008.description: All phil- compounds — filos, fileō, filadelfia (brotherly love), filanthrōpia (benevolence), filēma (kiss), filotheos (God-loving), filarguria (love of money). Cleanest morphological cluster on the Greek side.

G009.name: Spirit-Fruit Virtues
G009.description: Praotēs (gentleness), makrothumia (patience), chrēstotēs (kindness), agapē (love), tapeinofrosunē (humility), oiktirmos (compassion), hagios (holy) — broadly the fruit-of-the-Spirit cluster.

G010.name: Wisdom & Folly
G010.description: Sofia/sofos (wisdom/wise), mōria/mōros (foolishness), unwise, knowing, understanding, intelligent — plus shame and natural/psychic.

G011.name: Prayer & Struggle
G011.description: Proseuchomai/proseuchē (pray/prayer), deēsis (petition), eucharisteō (thank), epipotheō (long for), profēteuō (prophesy), agōnia (struggle), peirasmos (testing/temptation), spiritual.

G012.name: Self-Control & Sobriety
G012.description: Sōfrōn/sōfronizō (self-controlled), enkratēs (self-controlled), nēfaleos (sober), hagnos (pure), hosios (sacred), semnos (noble), filagathos (lover of good), filoxenos (hospitable), prosfilēs (lovely). The disciplined-virtues cluster.

G013.name: Shame & Boasting
G013.description: Kauchaomai/kauchēma (boast/pride) merged with aischunō/aischros (be ashamed/shameful), kataischunō (dishonor), foolish, sorrowful, eagerness, repent, ignore, groan, silent.

G014.name: Weakness & Authority
G014.description: Astheneia/astheneō/asthenēs (weakness/be weak/weak) merged with exousia (authority), ischuō (be strong), katakurieuō (master), proskaleō (call/summon), illness, unclean, fight. Polar weak/strong cluster.

G015.name: Vices & Wickedness
G015.description: NT vice catalogue — kakia (evil), ponēria/ponēros (evil/bad), eris (quarrel), hupokrisis (hypocrisy), adikia (unrighteousness), aselgeia (debauchery), blasfēmia (blasphemy), dolos (deceit), pikria (bitterness), pleonexia (greed), phthonos (envy).

G016.name: Mind & Anguish
G016.description: Reasoning/thought (dialogizomai, dialogismos, logismos, ennoia, fronēma, suniēmi), reflection (enthumeomai), anguish (odunē, sunochē), abomination, hardening, fleshly, grieve, die-with, predetermine, seize.

G017.name: Praise & Affirmation
G017.description: Eulogeō (bless/praise), ainesis (praise), humneō (praise), exomologeomai (agree), worthy, hospitable, purity, new, firstborn, foreknow, conformed, strong, hot — plus debauchery, decay, doubt, deport, distract, embitter, false-prophet, silence as outliers.

G018.name: Idolatry & Pollution
G018.description: Eidōlon family — idol, idolater, idol's-temple, sacrificed-to-idols — plus miainō/molunō (stain/defile), reject, slander, weak, gain, fainthearted.

G019.name: Will & Purpose
G019.description: Thelēma/thelō (will/desire), boulē/boulomai (plan/will), prothesis (purpose), eudokeō (delight), zēteō (seek), zēloō (be eager), oida (know), dokimazō (test) — plus disobedience, slave, contend, authority, plot.

G020.name: Remembrance
G020.description: All mna-/mneia- compounds — mimnēskō (remember), mneia (remembrance), anamnēsis (remembrance), hupomimnēskō (remind). Cleanest Greek morphological cluster.

G021.name: Power & Effort
G021.description: Dunamis/dunamoō/endunamoō (power/empower/strengthen), energeō/energeia (active/working), kratos (power), ischus (strength), agōnizomai (struggle), hagiōsunē (holiness), self-discipline, oppress, press-on.

G022.name: Harm & Apostasy
G022.description: Mixed wrong-doing cluster — adikeō (harm), apoballō (throw away), apokatallassō (reconcile), aporeō (perplexed), apostasia, ftheirō (destroy), hupokrinō (pretend), kataponeō (oppress), prodotēs (traitor), pantokratōr (almighty).

G023.name: Submission & Pressure
G023.description: Hupotagē (submission), hēsuchios (quiet), haplotēs (openness), eilikrineia (sincerity), koinōnia (participation), thlipsis (pressure), kauchēsis (pride), semnotēs (dignity), authenteō (domineer).

G024.name: Renewal & Hardening
G024.description: Polar mix — anakainoō (renew), metamorfoō (transform), allassō (change), doxa (glory), eikōn (image) merged with pōroō (harden), tufloō (blind), katakrisis (condemnation), ekkakeō (lose heart).

G025.name: Self-Control & Reverence
G025.description: Enkrateia (self-control), eulabeomai (revere), hosiotēs (holiness), hermēneuō (interpret), peacemaker, unity, foreknowledge, gentle, poor — plus enslave, conquer, cunning, quarrel.

G026.name: Truth, Love & Holiness
G026.description: Major theological cluster — alētheia (truth), alēthinos/alēthēs (true), agapaō (to love), hagiasmos/hagnizō (holiness/purify), katharos/katharizō (clean), logos (word), peithō (persuade), sōteria (salvation), hupakoē (obedience), telos (goal).

G027.name: Atonement & Grief (NT)
G027.description: Hilaskomai (propitiate), penthos (grief), aischunē (shame), exaleifō (blot out), basanos (torment), epichriō (rub on/anoint), gumnazō (train), ponos (travail), saving (sōtērion), boasting (alazoneia).

G028.name: Fear & Zeal
G028.description: Fobeō/fobos (fear), tromos (trembling), foberos/emfobos/ekfobos (fearful/afraid/terrified) — plus zēlos (zeal), spoudē (diligence), epipothēsis (longing), eusplanchnos (compassionate), entrepō (cause shame).

G029.name: Wrath, Calling & Mercy
G029.description: Orgē/orgizō (wrath/anger), kaleō/fōneō (call), doulos/sundoulos (slave), splanchnizō (pity), aphiēmi (release/leave), kurios (lord), praise, weeping, mistreat, blind, sift, perplexed. Heterogeneous mix of authority/anger/calling/mercy.

G030.name: Faith & Mercy
G030.description: Pistis/pisteuō/pistos (faith/believe/faithful), apistia (unbelief), oligopistos (little-faith), eleeō/eleēmōn (mercy/merciful), hilastērios (propitiation), aphiēmi:forgive, sōtēr (savior), hardness-of-heart, breath-of-spirit.

G031.name: Kingdom & Reign
G031.description: All basil- compounds — basileia (kingdom), basileuō (reign), basilikos (royal), basileion (palace), basilissa (queen), sumbasileuō (reign-with). Clean.

G032.name: Mixed Virtues & Vices
G032.description: WORST cohesion (0.40). Tapeinoō (humble), metanoeō (repent), peirazō (test/tempt), hagiotēs (holiness), hupokritēs (hypocrite), huperēfanos (arrogant), eulabeia (reverence), filautos (selfish), adolos (pure), alazōn (braggart), penthos (mourn), phthoneō (envy). Recommend recursive sub-clustering before naming sub-leaves.
